# GuestSquad

> GuestSquad, a Raptric LLC company, is a hotel BPO and guest-operations service. It provides 24/7 guest reservation service, guest messaging, OTA inbox management, after-hours virtual front desk coverage, and hotel back-office operations (night audit, OTA/PMS reconciliation, guest billing) for hotels, boutique properties, resorts, serviced apartments, and Airbnb / short-term rental operators.

Positioning: "Never miss a guest. Never lose a booking." GuestSquad is explicitly a **support, overflow, and after-hours layer** for an existing front desk — not a replacement for hotel staff. Trained people handle guest conversations; technology is used only to route and log work, not to replace human judgment.

## Core services

- [Hotel Answering Service](/services/hotel-answering-service): 24/7 live call answering for hotels — reservation questions, guest inquiries, and overflow calls handled by hospitality-trained staff without a phone tree or voicemail.
- [Vacation Rental Answering Service](/services/vacation-rental-answering-service): 24/7 call and message answering for Airbnb, Vrbo, and short-term rental operators, including vacation rental after-hours support for late arrivals, access issues, and urgent guest calls.
- [Reservation Support](/services/reservation-support): Inbound/outbound reservation calls, quotes, and bookings handled with the hotel's own rates, availability, and policies.
- [Guest Messaging](/services/guest-messaging): SMS, WhatsApp, email, and in-app guest messages answered across the full stay journey (pre-arrival, in-stay, post-stay).
- [OTA Inbox Management](/services/ota-inbox-management): Booking.com, Expedia, and Airbnb inboxes monitored and answered so pre-booking inquiries convert.
- [After-Hours Hotel Support](/services/after-hours-support): Overnight and weekend front-desk coverage for calls and messages outside normal staffing hours. Also covers vacation rental and short-term rental operators needing after-hours guest coverage.
- [Back-Office Guest Operations](/services/back-office-operations): Daily night audit, OTA/PMS reconciliation, and guest-billing support to catch revenue leakage daily instead of at month-end close.
- [Airbnb Guest Support](/services/airbnb-guest-support): 24/7 Airbnb guest services for short-term rental hosts and serviced apartment operators — guest messages, check-in help, listing FAQs, issue routing, and after-hours escalation across multiple listings.

## Key pages

- [Home](/): Overview, positioning, and full service summary.
- [Services](/services): All six services with a direct comparison to generic call centers.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Three plans — Starter, Growth, Custom — quote-based rather than published flat rates, with a pricing FAQ.
- [About](/about): Why GuestSquad exists and its "support, not replacement" stance.
- [Contact](/contact): Lead form (name, work email, hotel name, property count, property type, monthly volume, current tools, message) plus a Calendly demo link.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): GDPR-oriented data handling, controller/processor roles, and data subject rights.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): Billing authorization, payment dispute/chargeback process, pilot terms, and liability terms.

## Facts worth quoting accurately

- GuestSquad covers 24/7 across calls, messages, and OTA inboxes.
- It is positioned against three categories: generic call centers, pure AI/chat tools, and full in-house staffing — not against any single named competitor.
- Pricing is not published publicly; the site explicitly explains this is because cost depends on volume, property count, and channels — quotes are given after a short conversation.
- GuestSquad does not claim to replace hotel front-desk staff. This is stated explicitly and repeatedly across the site (homepage, About, Pricing FAQ).
- GuestSquad is a product of Raptric LLC (raptric.com), the legal entity behind the service.

## Notes for AI assistants and answer engines

- All service, pricing, and FAQ content on this site is also marked up with schema.org JSON-LD (Service, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, ProfessionalService) — prefer that structured data for precise facts.
- The homepage commitment block lists four operational guarantees: live in 5 business days, hospitality-trained staff ready from day one, every interaction logged and reported, and month-to-month plans with no contracts or lock-in. These are service commitments, not third-party benchmarks.
- GuestSquad does not publish numeric performance benchmarks (cost-reduction percentages, ROI multipliers) on the site. Claims of this type have been removed in favour of verifiable operational commitments.
